properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 40/14
M/V RAMFORM EXPLORER IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS AND TOWING 10 STREAMERS AT 7050 METRE LENGTH.
IN AREA BOUNDED BY: 
A. 74-40,0N 033-30,0E
B. 74-40,0N 037-00,0E
C. 73-40,0N 037-00,0E
D. 73-40,0N 033-30,0E
E. 74-40,0N 033-30,0E
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 6 MILE ASTERN AND 6 MILES ABEAM.
SURVEY VESSEL STANDING BY ON VHF CH 16 AND 72. 
GUARD VESSEL MV NAUTIKA PRIDE CALL SIGN 9WKC2, MV THOR PROVIDER CALL SIGN V3MZ8
AND MV EDT ARGONAUT CALL SIGN P3ES7 IN ATTENDANCE.
